case_title: CAMERON SWIGGETT VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER CARILLO CONTRERAS ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, FRANCISCO JAVIER CARILLO
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED ON 09-25-14 TO CAMERON SWIGGETT. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD"
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRED LOYA INSURANCE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWIGGETT, CAMERON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, FRANCISCO JAVIER CARILLO $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,588.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FRED LOYA INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT OF $534.43 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT AS THAT AMOUNT HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, FRANCISCO JAVIER CARILLO FRED LOYA INSURANCE
